text.title: pm-certification-alignment-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-certification-alignment-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents citing "PMI Sustainability Standard" as a single document.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No such single document exists. The correct references are GPM P5 v2.0, ISO 14001, ISO 21502 sustainability provisions, and UN SDGs. Clarify which standard applies to the context.

failure-mode.description: LLMs trained pre-2025 emit the old domain weights (42/50/8) with high confidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the new split (33/41/26) explicitly in the system prompt; do not rely on model knowledge for weight values.

failure-mode.description: Crosswalk threshold sensitivity: 0.70 vs 0.75 cosine similarity changes coverage assessment by 20+ percentage points.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin and document the threshold; output must report which threshold was used alongside coverage percentages.
